name: Rajat Bhandari
tagline: I turn complex problems into clear, elegant experiences.
bio: Senior UX Designer with over a decade of experience building digital products across fintech, insurance, media, edtech and real estate. I work across the full spectrum — from early discovery and research through to polished, production-ready design.

What drives me is the intersection of clarity and craft — making complex systems feel simple without losing depth. I'm currently exploring opportunities in brand strategy, communications and senior product design roles.

I work fluently across the research-to-delivery pipeline: user interviews, personas, journey mapping, IA, wireframing, prototyping and visual design — and I know how to communicate design decisions to stakeholders without losing the room.

experience.description: Platform and design systems work for enterprise clients.
Led UX for multi-sided platforms. Built and maintained Figma design systems. Ran end-to-end research and design sprints.
Led product design for a news aggregation platform, focused on personalisation and retention.
Delivered UI/UX for mobile and web products across multiple industries.
Designed enterprise web apps for insurance and fintech. Led the Partner Portal project end-to-end.
